recommendations.title: Mowgli: Legend of the Jungle
recommendations.overview: A human child raised by wolves, must face off against a menacing tiger named Shere Khan, as well as his own origins.

recommendations.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
recommendations.overview: After finding a host body in investigative reporter Eddie Brock, the alien symbiote must face a new enemy, Carnage, the alter ego of serial killer Cletus Kasady.

recommendations.title: Brighton Rock
recommendations.overview: Charts the headlong fall of Pinkie, a razor-wielding disadvantaged teenager with a religious death wish.

recommendations.title: A Beautiful Mind

recommendations.title: Concussion

recommendations.title: Walk. Ride. Rodeo.
recommendations.overview: Tells the incredible true story of Amberley Snyder, a nationally ranked rodeo barrel racer who defies the odds after barely surviving a car accident that leaves her paralyzed from the waist down.

recommendations.title: Inkheart
recommendations.overview: The adventures of a father and his young daughter, in their search for a long lost book that will help reunite a missing, close relative.

recommendations.title: Sorry If I Call You Love

recommendations.title: Dangal
recommendations.overview: Dangal is an extraordinary true story based on the life of Mahavir Singh and his two daughters, Geeta and Babita Phogat. The film traces the inspirational journey of a father who trains his daughters to become world class wrestlers.

recommendations.title: The Fundamentals of Caring
